Item.Question: The drummer hurled his sticks at the crowd.
I kissed my little brother on the cheek.
The boys hurled stones at their enemies.
Maureen played soccer with her friends.
Xena accidentally broke the vase.
Sheila kicked the ball very hard.
Tom bites his nails when he is nervous.
Pancho hates drama series.
Kristel answered the phone immediately.
Lisa washed her clothes this morning.
The professor showed us the microscope.
The microscope magnified the blood cells.
The audience disliked the performance.
He wanted to see the beautiful girl.
Joel fed the chickens before going to school.
My teacher wears a two-inch shoes.
Clyde heaped her plate with chickens.
Dolores cooked spaghetti for the kids.
Cathy left her keys at home.
Kristine locked the front door.
The space alien scared the kids.
Mom kissed my doll, too.
Mang Esteban collected our payment.
Mrs. Flores distributed the handouts.
The professor spotted the sleeping student.
Teresa sneaked some chips to her room.
Richard hid some mangoes in the cabinet.
The president delivered a long speech.
Nica hung our wet clothes.
A young boy threw stones at us.
Maria hit the ball using an old bat.
Adele revives wonderful songs.
Some NBA players met their fans.
Mr. Romero signed the contract.
Pilo showed his report card to Mom and Dad.
My sister wrote a story for the show.
My brother designed this building.
Some college students submitted their project late.
Thomas Edison invented the light bulb.
I turned off the alarm clock.
